token_economy: QUOTA-SCARCE (all four subscriptions are flat-rate monthly — cost is not the axis, quota scarcity is). Bounded by BOTH a 5h window AND a weekly window; REAL telemetry from ~/.codex/sessions rollouts drives the capacity gate. Assign ONLY when the task genuinely needs top-tier intelligence (hard algorithms, subtle correctness). Prefer the quota-abundant workhorses (opencode/kimi) for routine work.
role: Expert software engineer: complex algorithm implementation, subtle correctness, PyTorch/sentence-transformers/FAISS/NetworkX.
